description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three build jobs (build-android, build-linux, unit-tests) using nitlang/nit images and a deploy job using debian:jessie. In the build-android job (default stage) run nitc --version then make bin/sputnit.apk, store bin/sputnit.apk as an artifact, using the nitlang/nit:latest-full Docker image. In the build-linux job (default stage) run nitc --version then make bin/sputnit, archive both bin/sputnit and the assets/ directory as artifacts, also using nitlang/nit:latest-full. In the unit-tests job (default stage) run nitunit src/tests src/game with the nitlang/nit:latest image. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that depends on unit-tests, build-linux and build-android, runs only on the master branch, uses debian:jessie, installs openssh-client if missing, starts ssh-agent, adds $DEPLOY_PRIVATE_KEY, configures SSH to skip host checking, creates a tarball of bin/sputnit and assets/, and scp the apk and tarball to $DEPLOY_SERVER.
